body: Dr. Meera, JIDA ka Oct issue aaya. Aapke high-risk adult patients ke liye direct relevant finding — 2,100-patient Indian trial mein 3-month fluoride recall ne 6-month se 38% kam caries recurrence dikhaya. Aapka high-risk adult cohort large hai — kya main inke liye ek patient-education WhatsApp draft karun? (JIDA Oct 2026 p.14) Reply YES / STOP
rationale: research_digest trigger: cites JIDA Oct 2026 p.14 + trial_n (2,100) + 38% improvement + anchors to Dr. Meera's high_risk_adult_cohort signal. Compulsion levers: specificity (source+number+page), reciprocity, effort externalization. Hindi-English per ['en','hi'] pref.

body: Dr. Meera, DCI ka circular aaya — radiograph dose limits revise hue hain, effective Dec 15, 2026. Max dose per IOPA exposure: 1.5 mSv se 1.0 mSv. D-speed film naye limit mein fit nahi hoga; E-speed aur digital RVG sensors unaffected hain. Sirf 6 mahine hain deadline mein. Kya main aapke current X-ray setup ka compliance checklist draft karun? Reply YES / STOP
rationale: regulation_change trigger: cites DCI circular (source), exact dose numbers (1.5→1.0 mSv), names affected equipment (D-speed), states exact deadline (Dec 15, 2026). Compulsion levers: loss aversion (6-month deadline), specificity, effort externalization. Hindi-English.

body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic here 🦷 It's been 5 months since your last visit — your 6-month cleaning recall is due. Aapke liye 2 slots ready hain: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. ₹299 cleaning + complimentary fluoride. Reply 1 for Wed, 2 for Thu, or tell us a better time.
rationale: recall_due customer trigger: addresses Priya by name (not merchant), cites 5-month lapse, uses real slots from trigger payload (Wed 5 Nov 6pm, Thu 6 Nov 5pm), real catalog price (₹299 + fluoride bonus). send_as=merchant_on_behalf. Hi-en language mix per Priya's preference.

body: Bharat bhai, aapke calls last 7 days mein 50% gire — baseline 12 tha, abhi 4-6 pe aa gaya. Views (980/month) theek hain toh likely GBP listing mein issue hai: missing hours, stale photos, ya expired offer. Main 10-minute profile audit karke exact wajah identify karunga. Reply YES?
rationale: perf_dip trigger: names exact metric (calls), exact delta (-50%), exact baseline (12), current (~6), offers 3 likely causes, proposes 10-min audit. Compulsion levers: specificity (their own numbers), loss aversion, effort externalization. Hindi-English per ['en','hi','mr'] pref.

body: Bharat bhai, Pro plan sirf 12 din mein expire ho raha hai (renewal ₹4,999). Aapke 95 lapsed patients hain jo 6+ months se nahi aaye — renewal ke saath main inke liye ek free recall campaign bhi setup karunga. Expire hone par yeh patient data access aur campaign tools band ho jayenge. Reply YES to renew, STOP to skip.
rationale: renewal_due trigger: cites exact days_remaining (12), exact renewal_amount (₹4,999), ties renewal to 95 lapsed patients (from merchant's customer_aggregate). Compulsion levers: loss aversion (data access cuts off), specificity, effort externalization. Hindi-English.

body: Lakshmi ji, Diwali 188 days door hai — lekin salon bookings October se hi bhar jaate hain. Salons jo 4-6 weeks pehle festive campaign launch karti hain wo 22% zyada bookings lete hain (magicpin data). Main Studio11 ke liye 3 campaign options draft karti hoon (Haircut @ ₹99, Hair Spa @ ₹499, bridal package) — aap ek choose karo. Reply YES / STOP
rationale: festival_upcoming trigger: names festival+days_until (Diwali, 188 days), cites peer benchmark (22% more bookings 4-6 weeks early), anchors on real catalog prices (₹99, ₹499). Owner first name Lakshmi used. Compulsion levers: social proof, loss aversion (booking window), effort externalization.

body: Hi Kavya 💍 Lakshmi from Studio11 Kapra here. 196 days to your wedding (Nov 8) — your bridal trial is done, great start! The 30-day skin-prep program works best starting 90 days before (so around Aug 10). I've marked the window for you. Want me to block your preferred slot for the first session next week? Reply YES or tell us a day that works.
rationale: wedding_package_followup trigger: addresses Kavya by name, cites wedding_date (Nov 8), days_to_wedding (196), calculates 90-day start date (Aug 10), references trial_completed (from trigger payload). Compulsion levers: specificity, effort externalization (window calculated). send_as=merchant_on_behalf.

body: Lakshmi ji, quick check — is week Studio11 mein kaunsi service sabse zyada maangi ja rahi hai? (Colour, keratin, bridal, ya kuch aur?) Main us answer ko ek targeted Google post mein convert karti hoon — exactly usi audience ko target karega. Ek word bhi enough hai 👇
rationale: curious_ask_due trigger: asks merchant directly (compulsion lever: asking the merchant), offers to convert answer into a Google post (effort externalization), low-friction ask (one word enough). Owner first name Lakshmi. Hindi-English. CTA is open-ended — correct for info-gathering triggers.

body: Anjali ji, subscription lapse hue 38 days ho gaye — aur tab se 24 naye customers aapko Pune mein dhundh rahe the aur active listing nahi mili. Aapka CTR (2.2%) Pune salon avg (4%) se bhi half hai — matlab ~55 bookings/month elsewhere ja rahe hain. Fresh start? 10 min mein profile audit + reactivation. Reply YES / STOP
rationale: winback_eligible trigger: cites exact days_since_expiry (38), lapsed_customers_added_since_expiry (24), merchant's own CTR (2.2% from performance), peer avg (4%), calculates missed bookings (~55). Owner name Anjali. Compulsion levers: loss aversion, specificity, effort externalization.

body: Quick heads-up Suresh — DC vs MI at Arun Jaitley tonight, 7:30pm. One thing: Saturday IPL matches shift orders home-side — restaurant covers -12% vs Saturday average (magicpin Apr 2026 data). Skip a match-night dine-in push today; instead, activate your BOGO pizza (already live Tue-Thu) as a Saturday delivery special. Want me to draft a quick Swiggy post for it? 10 min. Reply YES / STOP
rationale: ipl_match_today trigger: interprets is_weeknight=false correctly — Saturday IPL = -12% covers (from digest d_2026W17_ipl_window), recommends AGAINST standard match promo. Leverages existing BOGO offer instead. This is the contrarian data-informed call the case study shows scores 50/50. Suresh named.

body: Suresh bhai, last 30 days mein 4 reviews mein ek common theme hai: 'delivery late — took 50 mins for a 15 min ride.' Yeh trend rising hai. Agar unchecked raha, star rating gir sakta hai (aap 4.1★ pe ho, metro avg 4.2★ hain). Main 3 fixes suggest kar sakta hoon jo delivery time perception ko better karti hain bina operations change kiye. Dekhein? Reply YES
rationale: review_theme_emerged trigger: quotes real customer language from payload ('took 50 mins for a 15 min ride'), cites 4 occurrences, names rising trend, anchors on star rating risk (4.1★ vs 4.2★ avg). Compulsion levers: specificity (real quote + rating numbers), loss aversion. Hindi-English.

body: Congrats Suresh — Mylari is at 145 reviews, 5 away from the 150 milestone! At 150, Google's local algorithm gives a ranking boost (avg +12% views for Bangalore restaurants in our data). Want me to draft a milestone Google post + a short 'leave us a review' WhatsApp you can send your last 10 customers? Reply YES / STOP
rationale: milestone_reached trigger: cites value_now (145), milestone_value (150), gap (5), quantifies algorithm benefit (+12% views). Owner name Suresh (Mylari). English per language pref. Compulsion levers: specificity, curiosity (what the milestone unlocks), effort externalization.

body:
Suresh, here's a starter version — edit as you like:

Mylari Corporate Thali (offices in Indiranagar)
• 10 thalis @ ₹130 each + free delivery
• 25 thalis @ ₹115 each + 2 filter coffees
• 50+ thalis @ ₹105 each + 1 free dosa platter
• WhatsApp order by 5pm; delivery 12:30-1pm

With 12,400 views/month and 88 calls, you have the volume for this. Want me to draft an outreach message to nearby offices? Reply YES
rationale: active_planning_intent trigger: merchant said 'yes good idea, what would it look like' — delivers the draft immediately (no qualifying questions). Uses merchant's real performance numbers (12,400 views, 88 calls). Tiered pricing matches B2B logic. Indiranagar locality anchors it. Compulsion: effort externalization.

body: Karthik, views are down 30% this week — but this is the normal April-June lull (every metro gym sees -25 to -35% in this window). Action: pause ad spend now, save it for Sept-Oct when conversion is 2x. Focus retention instead — you have 22 calls/month worth protecting. Want me to draft a 'summer attendance challenge' message to your current members? Reply YES / STOP
rationale: seasonal_perf_dip trigger: is_expected_seasonal=true — validates the dip as normal (-25 to -35% range), pivots to retention. Uses merchant's own call volume (22/month). Contrarian recommendation (pause ad spend). Case study 7 pattern. Karthik named. English per pref.

body: Hi Rashmi 👋 Karthik from PowerHouse here. It's been about 8 weeks — happens to most members at some point, no judgment. We've added a Tue/Thu evening HIIT class that fits weight-loss goals well (45 min, 6:30pm). Want me to hold a free trial spot for you next Tue? Reply YES — no commitment, no auto-charge.
rationale: customer_lapsed_hard trigger: addresses Rashmi by name, 57 days lapse (~8 weeks), references previous_focus (weight_loss), no-shame framing. Matches case study 8 gold standard exactly: 'no judgment' + 'no commitment' removes 2 barriers in one line. Karthik from PowerHouse (owner first name). send_as=merchant_on_behalf.

body:
Padma, here's a starter structure:

Zen Yoga Kids Summer Camp (Age 6-12)
• 6 weeks: June 2 – July 12
• Mon/Wed/Fri, 8–9am
• ₹3,500/child (early-bird: ₹2,999 before May 15)
• Max 12 kids/batch

With 4.9★ rating and 18 calls/month, parent word-of-mouth will fill this. Want me to draft the announcement post + a WhatsApp for your existing members to share? Reply YES
rationale: active_planning_intent trigger: merchant said 'what should it look like' — delivers draft immediately with real pricing anchors (₹3,499/₹2,999 early-bird), merchant's real stats (4.9★ rating, 18 calls). Padma named. No qualifying questions after explicit planning intent. English per Chennai preference.

body: Hi! Zen Yoga here 🧘 Karthik's trial on Apr 22 went great — hope he enjoyed it! One spot left in Sat 3 May, 8am batch. Early-bird price ₹2,999 (up to ₹3,500 after May 15 — that's ₹501 extra). 3 other parents already confirmed for this batch. Want us to lock in his spot? Reply YES or suggest a better time.
rationale: trial_followup trigger: references trial_date (Apr 22), real next session (Sat 3 May 8am from trigger payload), calculates exact saving (₹501), social proof (3 parents confirmed). Addresses customer by name (Karthik). Compulsion: scarcity (1 spot left), loss aversion (price goes up May 15). send_as=merchant_on_behalf.

body: Ramesh, urgent — voluntary recall on 2 atorvastatin batches (AT2024-1102, AT2024-1108) by MfrZ. Sub-potency issue, no safety risk, but customers need replacement. Check your stock now: quarantine these batches, log quantity, contact distributor for return. Your chronic Rx patients on statins need an alternate batch sourced. Want me to draft their WhatsApp note + the replacement workflow? Reply YES / STOP
rationale: supply_alert trigger: names exact batches (AT2024-1102, AT2024-1108), manufacturer (MfrZ), immediate 3-step action (quarantine/log/contact), bounded risk framing (sub-potency, not safety risk). Case study 9 gold standard pattern. Ramesh named. Compulsion: urgency=5, effort externalization.

body: Namaste — Apollo Health Plus Malviya Nagar yahan. Sharma ji ki 3 monthly medicines (metformin, atorvastatin, telmisartan) 28 April ko khatam hongi. Same dose, same brand pack ready hai. Senior discount 15% applied — aur free home delivery saved address pe by 5pm tomorrow. Reply CONFIRM to dispatch, ya call 9876543210 if any dosage change.
rationale: chronic_refill_due trigger: names all 3 molecules (metformin, atorvastatin, telmisartan), exact run-out date (Apr 28), applies Senior 15% OFF offer (from merchant's active offers), free delivery (saved address). Case study 10 gold standard. Namaste salutation respects senior context. send_as=merchant_on_behalf.

body: Ramesh bhai, summer demand signals aa gaye hain. Pharmacy aggregate Apr 2026: ORS +40%, sunscreen +38%, antifungal +45% — cold/cough -60%. Shelf reallocation is worth doing this week before peak. Quick Google post opportunity: 'Beat the heat — ORS, sunscreen, antifungal in stock at Apollo Health Plus, home delivery available.' Dono kaam main draft kar sakta hoon. Reply YES / STOP
rationale: category_seasonal trigger: cites real source (Multi-pharmacy aggregate Apr 2026) + exact % figures (ORS +40%, sunscreen +38%, antifungal +45%, cold/cough -60%). Bundles shelf action + Google post opportunity. Ramesh named. Hindi-English. Compulsion: specificity, effort externalization.

body: Vikas ji, Sunrise Medicos ka Google Business Profile abhi unverified hai. Verified pharmacies in Lucknow average 30% zyada views lete hain — aapka current 720 views/month se roughly 936 ho sakta hai. Verification process: postcard ya phone call, 5-10 minutes. Main step-by-step guide bhej sakta hoon. Reply YES / STOP
rationale: gbp_unverified trigger: uses estimated_uplift_pct from payload (+30%), calculates actual number (720 → 936 views), names verification paths (postcard or phone call, 5-10 min). Vikas named. Gomti Nagar Lucknow context. Compulsion: specificity (calculated uplift), loss aversion, effort externalization.

body: Dr. Meera, one more from this week — IDA Delhi has a webinar: 'Digital impressions 2026 state of the art.' Speaker: Dr. R. Mehta, covers Primescan 2, Trios 5, CAD/CAM ROI for solo practices. 2 CDE credits. Free for IDA members. Worth 90 min if crown or aligner work is part of your mix. Shall I send the registration link? Reply YES
rationale: cde_opportunity trigger: cites digest item d_2026W17_ida_webinar exactly — speaker (Dr. R. Mehta), topics (Primescan 2, Trios 5, CAD/CAM ROI), credits (2 CDE), fee (free for members). Source: IDA Delhi chapter calendar. Dr. Meera addressed. Clinical peer tone. Compulsion: specificity, reciprocity.

body: Dr. Meera, heads up — Smile Studio opened 1.3km away (Apr 8) with 'Dental Cleaning @ ₹199'. Your cleaning is @ ₹299 — that's ₹100 more. Counter-move: activate your 'Free Consultation' offer and update your GBP to lead with your 4-year track record + 540 patients YTD. Price-sensitive patients will go there; trust-seeking patients will stay with you. Want me to draft the updated GBP description + a positioning response offer? Reply YES / STOP
rationale: competitor_opened trigger: uses real payload data (competitor_name=Smile Studio, distance_km=1.3, their_offer=₹199, opened_date=Apr 8). Frames counter-positioning using merchant's actual stats (540 patients YTD from customer_aggregate). Dr. Meera addressed. Compulsion: specificity, loss aversion, effort externalization.

body: Padma, good news — calls are up 15% this week vs baseline (18 → ~21/week), likely driven by the kids yoga post. Best time to ride this: a follow-up post while momentum is live. Want me to draft a 'filling fast' post with the early-bird price (₹2,999 before May 15)? Typically locks in bookings before interest fades. Reply YES / STOP
rationale: perf_spike trigger: cites exact delta (+15%), baseline (18), current (~21), likely_driver from payload (kids_yoga_post). Proposes capturing momentum with concrete action + price anchor (₹2,999). Padma named. Compulsion: specificity, loss aversion (momentum fades), effort externalization. English per Chennai.

body: Anjali ji, last we spoke was about your subscription expiry — 38 days ago. Profile is still live but CTR (2.2%) is half of Pune salon avg (4%). That gap = ~55 bookings/month going elsewhere. Fresh start: I can audit your profile in 10 minutes and show the 3 biggest fixes. No commitment needed. Reply YES or tell me a better time.
rationale: dormant_with_vera trigger: references last_topic (subscription_expiry), days_since_last_merchant_message (38), uses merchant's own CTR (2.2% from performance), peer avg (4%), calculates lost bookings (~55). New angle — doesn't repeat subscription pitch. Anjali named. Compulsion: specificity, loss aversion, fresh start framing.
